caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Elevated Seas Impact Turks and Caicos
caribbean.paragraph: Turks and Caicos is experiencing sustained easterly winds of 21 knots with wave heights reaching 6.7 feet and an 8-second swell period, creating choppy marine conditions. Rain chances are moderate at 61 percent, while nearby Bimini reports slightly stronger winds near 24 knots but lower wave heights.

mediterranean.headline: Calm Conditions Prevail Across Western Mediterranean Ports
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing mild westerly winds up to 19 knots with moderate seas holding near 3.9 feet and a swell period of 12 seconds. Rain chances remain low at 23 percent, indicating stable maritime conditions favorable for navigation and port operations.
